mapper.select:
select nodeId,maxVersion from ( select NODE_ID as nodeId,max(FILE_VERSION) as maxVersion from M_NODE_THREE
PRG_TYPE = #{prgType}
group by NODE_ID)
(nodeId=#{item.nodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and maxVersion=#{item.fileVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER})
select count(*) from m_flow_three where to_char(INSERT_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') = to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd')
mapper.insert:
insert all
INTO M_NODE_RELATION(NODE_ID,NODE_NAME,FILE_VERSION,NEXT_NODE_ID,NEXT_NODE_NAME,INSERT_TIME) values( #{record.nodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{record.nodeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{record.fileVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{record.nextNodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{record.nextNodeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},SYSDATE )
select 1 from dual
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT node_id FROM m_node_three WHERE PRG_TYPE=#{prgType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT count(*) FROM m_flow_three WHERE (CPU_CONSUMPTION IS NOT NULL OR MEMORY_CONSUMPTION IS NOT NULL OR LAST_OUT_RECORDS IS NOT NULL OR OUT_TABLE_NUM IS NOT NULL) AND #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}=TASK_ID
SELECT id,task_id as taskid,status,prg_type as prgtype FROM M_FLOW_THREE WHERE INSERT_TIME>=TRUNC(SYSDATE) and prg_type !=98
